title: Getting Started with Linux Kernel Debugging

title: Understanding WebSockets from Scratch
description: HTTP is request-response. WebSockets are persistent. Here's how they actually work at the protocol level.

title: How I Learned to Love the Terminal
description: I used to avoid the command line at all costs. Now it's the first thing I open every morning. Here's what changed.

description: A streamlined, easy and fast guide for spinning up a working Gentoo CLI base environment utilizing a pre-compiled binary kernel.

title: A Field Guide to Zsh Plugins
description: Not all Zsh plugins are worth installing. Here are the ones I actually use daily and why they earn their place.
